name: Little Chief Smoked Salmon Deluxe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, non-iodized salt, soy sauce, water, onion powder, garlic powder, pepper, and tabasco sauce in a large bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are dissolved.
3. Place salmon chunks into the brine mixture, ensuring they are fully covered.
4. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours or longer, up to several days.
5. Remove the salmon from the brine and rinse well under cold running water.
6. Pat the salmon dry with paper towels.
7. Allow the salmon to air dry on a clean surface for at least one hour before smoking.
